hint: Unlock every other achievement in Persona 5 Royal to get this completionist trophy.
Story related. Defeat Shadow Kamoshida and secure the treasure.
Story related. Defeat Shadow Madarame and secure the treasure.
Story related. Defeat Shadow Kaneshiro and secure the treasure.
Story related. Defeat the Cognitive Wakaba Isshiki and secure the treasure.
Story related. Defeat Shadow Okumura and secure the treasure. Make sure to use Baton Passes and exploit elemental weaknesses for his robot waves.
Story related. Defeat Shadow Sae and secure the treasure.
Story related. Defeat Shadow Shido and secure the treasure.
Story related. Reach the bottom of Mementos and defeat the Holy Grail / Yaldabaoth.
Clear the final, Royal-exclusive Palace. You MUST unlock the third semester by maxing out Takuto Maruki's Confidant (Rank 9) before November 17th.
Watch the True Ending of Persona 5 Royal. This requires unlocking the third semester (Max Maruki Confidant) and rejecting any 'deals' proposed by the final bosses.
Story related. Unlocks automatically during Joker's awakening in the Castle Palace.

description: Established your own squad of thieves.
hint: Story related. Unlocks naturally early in the game when you formally name your group at the hideout.
Complete any side mission given by Mishima by exploring Mementos and defeating the target.

description: Scored the highest on your exams.
hint: You need Rank 5 (Erudite) Knowledge and must answer all exam questions correctly. Exams occur in May, July, October, and December.
Reach Rank 5 in Knowledge, Guts, Proficiency, Kindness, and Charm. Do activities like reading, visiting the diner, watching movies, and taking the Big Bang Burger challenge.

description: Went to a hangout spot with someone.
hint: Read a location book to unlock a spot (like Destinyland or the Aquarium), or just accept an invitation from a Confidant to go somewhere on a weekend.
Reach Rank 9 with a female Confidant and choose the romance dialogue option to initiate a relationship.

description: Maxed out one of your Confidants.
hint: Reach Rank 10 with any Confidant. The Fool (Igor) and Magician (Morgana) rank up automatically through the story.
Reach Rank 10 with any of your Phantom Thief party members to evolve their starting Persona into its second form.
During a Hold-Up (triggered by hitting weaknesses), choose to talk to the shadow and answer its personality-based questions correctly to recruit it.
After hitting an enemy's weakness to get a '1 More', press the indicated trigger to pass your turn to a teammate.

description: Defeated enemies via Disaster Shadow explosion.
hint: Disaster Shadows glow with a dark aura. Kill one, and it will explode, damaging surrounding enemies. Unlocks when this explosion kills another enemy.
Story related. You will use the grappling hook naturally during exploration in the Castle Palace.
Hit an enemy afflicted with a status ailment with a corresponding attack (e.g., using a Physical or Gun attack on a Shocked or Frozen enemy).

description: Obtained a Skill Accessory from a Palace ruler.
hint: Find all 3 hidden Will Seeds in a single Palace to get a Crystal. Take this Crystal to Jose in Mementos, and he will upgrade it into a Skill Accessory Ring.
Encounter a floating gem/jewel enemy in a Palace or Mementos. Hit its weakness (early ones are weak to Nuke or Psy) to knock it down and negotiate for it.
Showtime attacks are powerful tag-team moves unlocked through story progression starting around the Bank Palace. They trigger randomly; press the prompt to execute.

description: Traded in flowers while in Mementos.
hint: Collect the glowing flowers scattered around Mementos paths. Find Jose in one of the rest areas and trade them for items.

description: Traded in stamps while in Mementos.
hint: Find stamp stations at the end of Mementos floors or behind breakable walls. Talk to Jose to trade these stamps for cognitive changes.

description: Completely changed the cognition of Mementos.
hint: Max out one of the three cognitive alterations (EXP, Money, or Items) by giving enough stamps to Jose in Mementos.
Occasionally, a Mementos floor will be completely dark, have no map, or only contain powerful enemies. Entering any floor with these random conditions unlocks this.
Wait completely still on a floor in Mementos for about 3 minutes to spawn the Reaper. It is highly recommended to be Level 70+ and have strong buffs/debuffs.
Simply fuse two Personas together using the standard 'Normal Guillotine' option in the Velvet Room.
Unlock the Advanced Guillotine by raising the Strength Confidant (Twins) to Rank 1. Then fuse a Persona requiring 3 or more ingredients.

description: Used Incense on a Persona in Lockdown.
hint: Unlock Lockdown by raising the Strength Confidant to Rank 3. Place a Persona in Lockdown and use an Incense item to boost its stats.
Unlocked automatically during the story. Sacrifice one Persona to give experience points (and potentially transfer a skill) to another.

description: Performed an execution during a Fusion Alarm.
hint: Fusion Alarms unlock automatically after securing the route in the Bank Palace. Enter the Velvet Room while the door is glowing red and perform any execution.
Unlocked automatically on August 1st. Itemize a Persona to turn it into a weapon, accessory, or skill card.
Interact with the restroom door or the counter area inside Cafe Leblanc during the evening to clean up. This also gives a Kindness boost.
Apply for a job at the magazine stand in the Shibuya Underground Walkway (Convenience Store, Flower Shop, etc.), then work a shift.

description: Scored a hit at the batting cages.
hint: Go to the Batting Cages in Yongen-Jaya. Carefully time your swing to hit the ball at least once during the session.

description: Couldn't take the heat in the bathhouse.
hint: Visit the Bathhouse in Yongen-Jaya on a rainy day or a Monday/Thursday. There is a chance Joker will pass out from the intense heat.
Buy a lottery ticket at Station Square in Shibuya. Return 7 days later to check the results. Any winning amount unlocks the achievement.

description: Scored a prize in the crane game.
hint: Play the crane game at the Akihabara Arcade. Playing on dates ending in '7' (7th, 17th, 27th) greatly increases your chance of winning.

description: Sold old clothing at Furugi no Neuchi.
hint: Wash 'Sooty' armor pieces in the Yongen-Jaya laundromat, then sell the cleaned items at the secondhand clothes store in Kichijoji.
Visit Penguin Sniper in Kichijoji with a party member and play darts. This is highly recommended anyway as it raises Baton Pass ranks.
Visit Penguin Sniper in Kichijoji and play billiards to increase your team's Technical attack rank.
Unlock the Jazz Club by reaching Rank 4 with Goro Akechi. Invite any party member there during the evening.
Go to the Temple in Kichijoji during the day to meditate. It passes time but permanently increases Joker's max SP.
Reach Rank 1 with Munehisa Iwai (Hanged Man Confidant), which requires Level 4 Guts (Dauntless). Then use his shop to customize a ranged weapon.

description: Passed time at the fishing pond.
hint: Unlock the Ichigaya fishing pond by reading the 'Fishpond Spotter' book or being invited by Ryuji. Go there and fish at least once.

description: Ordered from the special menu at the maid café.
hint: Visit the Maid Cafe in Akihabara and spend a cumulative total of 20,000 yen across multiple visits. They will offer you a special menu on your next visit.
